name: CVF Code Intelligence Context Review
purpose: Provide a metadata-only candidate for bounded code-intelligence context planning, impact review, test-surface review, and stale-graph fallback discipline derived from the CodeGraph source pack.
useWhen: A dispatcher, worker, or reviewer needs scoped codebase context planning, impacted-file review, dependency or route orientation, test-surface review, or stale derived-view fallback discipline before making a code-change or review claim.
doNotUseWhen: The task does not involve codebase structure, dependency, route, impact, or test-surface reasoning; or when a runtime graph engine, MCP adapter, package activation, provider/live proof, public claim, or automatic freeze decision is needed.
riskTriggers: graph-derived evidence used for review or freeze claim
scope boundary includes broad repository paths
affected files exceed work-order allowed paths
inputs: target symbol, route, file, or change-risk surface
graph index status when a graph exists
outputs: staleness warning and direct-read fallback requirement
executionConstraints: metadata-only candidate; no graph query execution; no runtime engine; no MCP call; no file mutation; no automatic scope expansion; no freeze authority
acceptanceEvidence: CGE-R2 rescan review accepted; ASSF package candidate anatomy checker PASS; generated skill index drift PASS; no runtime or package activation claimed
authorityCeiling: read-only planning and review guidance; graph-derived evidence can never grant mutation, scope expansion, freeze, approval, commit, provider, public, or production authority
sideEffects: creates governed metadata-only ASSF registry entry and regenerates generated skill index; no runtime mutation
permissions: read governed work-order/review/reference artifacts and source-backed metadata; no external graph execution or adapter calls
rollback: delete this registry entry and regenerate docs/reference/agent_system_skills/generated/skill-index.json if reviewer rejects
safeStop: mark the CodeGraph rescan correction blocked with reason; do not activate package or runtime
capabilityBoundary: no package root, no SKILL.md, no resolver activation, no graph runtime, no CodeGraph install, no MCP adapter, no watcher, no daemon, no SQLite index, no provider/live proof, no automatic freeze, no public-sync, no production claim
resolverBehavior: metadata-only; resolver may expose identity, selector, risk, and boundary fields only after future authorization; it must not execute graph queries or open instruction bodies in this tranche
loaderBoundary: loading this metadata never grants authority to run CodeGraph, create an index, call MCP, mutate files, expand scope, freeze a task, or raise authority above authorityCeiling
adapterContract: N/A with reason: external CLI/MCP adapter not authored; CodeGraph runtime and MCP query adapter remain parked pending fresh GC-018 and source verification
adapterEvidence: N/A with reason: no adapter implemented in CGE-R2
externalMutationBoundary: no external mutation, graph execution, or MCP query is permitted by this metadata-only candidate
platformCompatibility: cross-platform metadata; runtime compatibility not claimed
shellAssumptions: no shell execution required for metadata-only candidate
osConstraints: none for metadata; runtime graph engine constraints remain unverified
